title: Rivulet of Universe
overview: Cambodian migrant Jit travels to Phimai, Thailand, seeking to explore his newfound power to perceive beyond the strictures of time. As he wanders the temple town with Pim and Tat, a young couple drifting apart, the boundaries between myth, history and reality begin to blur.
